name: LRU-cache
summary: Least Recently Used cache. HashMap + doubly linked list. O(1) get/put. Evict item ít dùng nhất.

facts.text: hashmap: O(1) lookup. Linked list: O(1) move-to-front
khi full: remove tail (least recently used)
DNS cache, CPU cache, web cache, database buffer pool

danger: thread-safe: cần lock hoặc concurrent map
cache invalidation là 1 trong 2 hard problems
